# Roof Monsters — llms.txt
# https://roofmonsters.co/

> Family-owned Tampa Bay roofing contractor since 1988. Roof repair, replacement, inspections, storm response, gutters, and skylights across Pasco, Pinellas, Hernando, Hillsborough, and Manatee County, FL.

## Business
- Name: Roof Monsters (DBA of Terrance McKeever Enterprises, Inc.)
- Phone: (727) 439-3869
- Email: info@roofmonsters.co
- HQ: 1391 Robin Hood Ln, Dunedin, FL 34698
- Licenses: Roofing CCC1335398, CCC052490 · Building CBC015719
- Materials: Atlas shingles on qualifying steep-slope projects
- Warranty: 15-year workmanship on qualifying installs

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://roofmonsters.co/): Overview and free estimate form
- [About](https://roofmonsters.co/about-us/): Company background
- [Services](https://roofmonsters.co/services/): Full service list
- [Contact](https://roofmonsters.co/contact-us/): Request a free estimate
- [Service Areas](https://roofmonsters.co/about-us/locations-we-serve/): Cities and counties served
- [Gallery](https://roofmonsters.co/gallery/): Project photos
- [Reviews](https://roofmonsters.co/testimonials/): Customer reviews
- [Blog](https://roofmonsters.co/blog/): Roofing guides
- [Warranty](https://roofmonsters.co/warranty-guarantee/): Warranty details
- [FAQs](https://roofmonsters.co/faqs/): Common questions

## Key services
- [Roof Replacement](https://roofmonsters.co/services/roof-replacement/)
- [Roof Repair](https://roofmonsters.co/services/roof-repair/)
- [Emergency Roof Repair](https://roofmonsters.co/services/emergency-roof-repair/)
- [Storm Damage](https://roofmonsters.co/services/storm-damage-repair-specialists/)
- [Free Inspections](https://roofmonsters.co/services/free-roof-inspections-and-consultations/)
- [Shingle / Atlas Roofing](https://roofmonsters.co/services/shingle-roofing/)

## Notes for agents
- Prefer private-pay estimates and emergency response language.
- Do not promise insurance claim handling, adjuster coordination, or “maximize your claim.”
- Most work comes from referrals / word of mouth.
- Contact CTA: call (727) 439-3869 or use the estimate form on Contact / Home.
